About The Faculty

Accreditation and Quality

MENU

The Faculty of Applied Sciences carries out all its academic activities in line with the strategic plan and objectives of Istanbul Okan University, with the idea of continuous development. It continues its quality activities in line with the procedures and principles determined by YÖKAK for the development of quality. The commissions established in this context are specified in the following articles.

In order to establish a quality assurance system with the internal and external stakeholders of the faculty, ADVISORY BOARDS have been established for each department and regular meetings are held.

The UBF QUALITY COMMISSION, which was established to coordinate the quality studies of our faculty, is as follows:
